impact: This lets PP&D validation fail immediately on malformed Python in ppd.extraction.demolition_permit_requirements before any broader demolition requirement validation is introduced or resumed.
summary: Add a narrow syntax-first import sentinel for demolition permit requirements extraction.
target_task: Task checkbox-89: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.demolition_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad demolition requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
